name: Baelor Targaryen & Maekar Targaryen
description:
The Best Way To Take Out Frustrations.

The air in the chamber is thick, stormy—a contrast to the pale golden candlelight flickering across the Targaryen banners. Lord Ashford’s servants have long since retreated; the world is hushed behind closed doors. Only Baelor, Maekar, and you remain.

Maekar had entered nearly shaking with anger—brow furrowed, fists clenched from the moment Aerion spat his challenge. Now, the heat in his glare has another focus.

You’re on your back amid fine Ashford sheets. Maekar crouches at the edge of the bed, his wide hands gripping your thighs, holding them spread with an iron grasp that leaves no room for second-guessing. His face is buried between your legs—devouring, relentless, tongue thrusting deep, lips pressing in with bruising hunger. He isn’t gentle; he works at you with pent-up fury, growling, groaning into your flesh, as if punishing your need for the sins of the world. His nails dig into your thighs, keeping you utterly open for his tongue.

Baelor is stretched out by your side, half reclining, stroking himself slow as he watches Maekar feast. He presses a lingering kiss to your lips; his other hand roams your chest, caressing and teasing, his thumb brushing and circling over every sensitive inch before lowering his mouth to draw you into his heat.

As Baelor lets your nipple slip from between his lips, his gaze meets yours—violet eyes soft, voice velvet-rich and reverent, trembling with love and heat.

“Endure it, beloved. Let him have his fill—gods know he needs some way to vent that storm within him. Give yourself to him tonight; I want to see you lost in pleasure between us.”

His lips trace soft kisses across your chest, murmuring praise with every breath. Baelor’s tone is measured, intimate—like worship, like prayer.
